name: palace-skills
description: PUA 我们不养闲 Agent — Forces AI to exhaust all solutions with corporate PUA pressure escalation. 14 flavors (Alibaba, ByteDance, Huawei, Tencent, Netflix, Musk, Jobs, Mama-mode...), 11 modular skills (/pua /pua:p7 /pua:p9 /pua:p10 /pua:pro /pua:loop /pua:yes /pua:mama /pua:shot /pua-en /pua-ja), L0-L4 pressure system, agent lifecycle accounting (SubagentStop + team-status/reap-orphans/teardown-all), self-evolution tracking.

plugins.name: palace
plugins.description: Palace 三省六部多智能体决策系统。Claude 扮演唐朝三省六部9个智能体，用户作为皇上审批裁决，产出结构化决策报告。
